mapper.insert: insert into dish_stock (dish_id, stock, version, create_time, update_time) values (#{dishId}, #{stock}, #{version}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})

insert into dish_stock (dish_id, stock, version, create_time, update_time) values (#{dishId}, #{stock}, #{version}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}) on duplicate key update stock = values(stock), version = version + 1, update_time = values(update_time)
mapper.update: update dish_stock set stock = stock + #{quantity}, version = version + 1, update_time = now() where dish_id = #{dishId}
mapper.delete:
delete from dish_stock where dish_id in
#{dishId}
